description_long: This house features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof finished in a light gray tone. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal blue siding, complemented by white trim around the windows and doors. The front facade showcases a wide porch with decorative balustrades and a set of three large, grid-patterned windows, suggesting a bright and airy interior. The entryway is centrally located and accentuated by a small overhang and steps leading up from the porch. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal ornamentation, while the roof extends symmetrically over the entire structure. The overall design is reminiscent of a Craftsman bungalow, blending functional simplicity with inviting curb appeal.
description: A single-story blue house with a gable roof, wide front porch, and large grid-patterned windows, featuring Craftsman-style details and white trim.
description_view_0: Side view showing blue horizontal siding, two large grid-patterned windows, and the side of the front porch with balustrades.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the gable roof, a single horizontal window near the roof peak, and plain blue siding with minimal detailing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with blue siding, two large windows, and the side of the porch visible.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the wide porch with balustrades, three large grid-patterned windows, central entryway, and decorative overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large grid-patterned windows on the front, minimal windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a small overhang, steps, wide porch, and decorative balustrades
